completed_tasks.name: Phase 9 UAT: fix idle canvas not re-rendering after sprite load
Phase 9 UAT: all 7 tests passed, VERIFICATION.md written
Post-UAT fix: correct spin direction, remove blue overlay, fix cell overrun
Fix blue line (sh 79→78): was still hitting section separator row
Replace shape fallback with running sprite + space jump for all jumps

remaining_tasks.name: Fix blue line still visible on ground (iOS confirmed)
remaining_tasks.detail: sh=77 still clips the section 01 (runRight) separator. Reduce sh to 76 or check exact separator row. In drawSamus.ts: sw = sh = contentSize - 4 currently (=77). Try contentSize - 5 (=76). Verify with Playwright pixel scan after change.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix start/game-over screen showing old block character
remaining_tasks.detail: Static scenes (screen !== 'playing') use drawSamusIdle shape in drawScene's else branch (line ~82-88 in SamusRunGame.tsx). Need to use sprite frame 0 of runRight for these screens. Pass spritesRef.current to the static drawScene call at line ~143, add sprite draw path in the else branch.

remaining_tasks.name: Skip frame 0 of screwAttackL (non-spinning upright frame)
remaining_tasks.detail: screwAttackL (sy=3505) frame 0 is the upright standing pose — causes a visible static flash at jump start before spinning begins. Fix: start jump animation at frame 1 instead of 0. In SamusRunGame.tsx, on takeoff reset: set animState.frame = 1 (not 0). Also on pendingScrewAttack reset: frame = 1.

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 10: Background Scroll — discuss → plan → execute
remaining_tasks.detail: Goal: Norfair background tiles scroll at fixed independent speed with seamless wrap. Success criteria: ENV-01, ENV-02. No plans exist yet. After Phase 9 bugs are fixed, proceed to /gsd-discuss-phase 10 or /gsd-plan-phase 10.

decisions.decision: runRight section (sy=185, 4 frames) for ground state — replaces shape fallback
decisions.rationale: Section 01 'Facing right - normal' found at sy=185 in sprite sheet; user confirmed shape fallback must be removed

decisions.decision: screwAttackL (section 1C, sy=3505) for ALL airborne states (both first and second jump)
decisions.rationale: 1C has the space jump energy vortex visual (user wanted 'space jump not basic spin') AND spins forward. Section 1A was basic morph ball spin; 1B spins left.
Blue section separator sits at row 94 within the runRight cell (not row 95 as in spin sections). Need 77 to stay clear of row 278. May need 76 — still TBD.

decisions.decision: Frame counter advances on ground too; resets on takeoff not landing
decisions.rationale: Running animation needs to cycle; jump should start fresh. prevIsAirborne tracks ground→air transition.

next_action: Fix the 3 remaining Phase 9 bugs (tasks 6, 7, 8) then proceed to Phase 10. Start with task 6 (sh=76 change in drawSamus.ts) — it's a one-liner. Task 7 (static screen sprite) requires passing sprites to the else-branch drawScene call. Task 8 (skip frame 0) is a one-line change to the frame reset value.
context_notes: Phase 9 has 3 open bugs found during iOS user testing this session. All are small fixes (<5 lines each). v0.1.13 is current production. Key files: components/samus-run/canvas/drawSamus.ts (sh value), components/samus-run/SamusRunGame.tsx (static screen draw + frame reset). Phase 10 is completely untouched — no CONTEXT.md, no PLAN.md, no plans.
